name: aiignore-codex
description: Supplemental Codex adapter for the experimental aiignore policy specification

interface.shortDescription: Apply experimental .aiignore.yaml policy checks in Codex.
interface.longDescription: Compiles .aiignore.yaml filesystem and network rules into Codex permission profiles and adds supplemental tool-boundary checks.
interface.defaultPrompt: Validate this repository's .aiignore.yaml policy and report its Codex enforcement gaps.
